description_long: This object consists of two ripe, glossy red cherries joined together by slender, green stems. The cherries are round and plump, with a smooth, shiny surface that reflects light, giving them a fresh and appetizing appearance. The stems are long, thin, and slightly curved, emerging from the tops of the cherries and converging at the upper end. There are no visible leaves or blossoms attached to the stems, and the cherries themselves are free of blemishes or imperfections. The overall look is vibrant and natural, with the deep red color of the fruit contrasting against the bright green of the stems. This pair of cherries would be commonly seen in urban parks, markets, or as part of decorative displays.
description: A pair of glossy, red cherries with long green stems, smooth and plump in appearance. The cherries are joined together, creating a fresh and vibrant look.
description_view_0: Two round, shiny red cherries side by side with both green stems visible and separated at the top.
description_view_1: The cherries are viewed from the side, with one cherry mostly obscured behind the other and both stems visible, curving together.
description_view_2: A nearly identical view to view 0, showing both cherries clearly with their stems separated at the top.
description_view_3: The cherries are viewed from the opposite side of view 1, with the other cherry now in front and the stems still visible.
